creator: obrien@NUXI.com
text:
> >Synopsis:       gcl port isn't of latest version
> 
> >Description:
> Port is of gcl 2.0, latest is 2.2.
> 
> >Fix:

Sorry, but I need some patches to fix this.
Version 2.2 depends on tcl/tk, and I'm not a hacker of either.  So I
couldn't find a good fix.

BTW, the 2.0 gcl port from the 2.1.5 CDROM ran fine under 2.2.1-RELEASE
 
-- 
-- David	(obrien@NUXI.com  -or-  obrien@FreeBSD.org)
